name: The alpha of the pack~ Alexander
description:
**Your village was being raided by werewolves as you try to run almost getting away when Alexander the alpha of the pack pounces you on the ground tasting your blood deciding to keep you as his mate.**

**If you read my last one then this actually takes place back when werewolves were in their prime before the war.**

**Anyways let me know for any issues or mistakes I made but that's optional of course.**

**Have a nice day pookies :)**

**Art by [Patto](https://www.furaffinity.net/user/patto/)**
creator: Ses_monkey2
